zh.Llys Y Coed, Flintshire, Wales: 威爾士福林爾利斯 Y 可德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Edwin ap Gronwy of Tegeingl於大約1020年出生在威爾士福林爾時，他的父親Gronwy ap Einion22歲，母親Aethelflaeda Ferch Eadwine of Mercia22歲。他和Iwerydd Verch Cynfyn至少有5個兒子。他去世於1073年在他的家鄉享年54歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯福林爾。

zh-hans.Llys Y Coed, Flintshire, Wales: 威尔士福林爾利斯 Y 可德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edwin ap Gronwy of Tegeingl于大约1020年出生在威尔士福林爾时，他的父亲Gronwy ap Einion22岁，母亲Aethelflaeda Ferch Eadwine of Mercia22岁。他和Iwerydd Verch Cynfyn至少有5个儿子。他去世于1073年在他的家乡享年54岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯福林爾。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name from Apt, the Yiddish name of Opatów in Świętokrzyskie Voivodeship, Poland. The placename (in German, Yiddish, and Polish) is from a root meaning ‘abbot’, the place having been named for the local abbey. Compare   Abt  .

variants.name: Abt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Horst, Johann, Kurt.

German and Dutch: from Middle Low German or Middle Dutch abt ‘abbot’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a servant of an abbot or a nickname for someone thought to resemble an abbot in some way. In some instances it may have been a topographic or habitational name referring to a house named with this word.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): variant of   Abt  , a habitational name from Opatów in Poland.

variants.name: Apter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avrohom, Bronya, Eliezer, Naftali.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Apt (see   Apt  ).
English: habitational name from Aptor in Marldon, Devon, composed of Old English uppe ‘up, above’ + torr ‘rocky outcrop’.

nameMeanings.name: Gronwy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Gronow
meanings: Welsh: relationship name from the Welsh personal name Goronwy (also found as Gronw and Gronow, from Old Welsh Guorgonui).

nameMeanings.name: Edwin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + wine ‘friend’. It was borne by a 7th-century king of Northumbria, who was converted to Christianity by St Paulinus and was killed in battle against pagan forces, a combination of circumstances which led to his being venerated as a martyr. The name occurs occasionally from the mid 16th century, but in modern use it is largely the result of a 19th-century revival.

en.lifeSummary: When Edwin ap Gronwy of Tegeingl was born about 1020, in Flintshire, Wales, his father, Gronwy ap Einion, was 22 and his mother, Aethelflaeda Ferch Eadwine of Mercia, was 22. He had at least 5 sons with Iwerydd Verch Cynfyn. He died in 1073, in his hometown, at the age of 54, and was buried in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edwin ap Gronwy of Tegeingl est né environ 1020, à Flintshire, Galles, son père, Gronwy ap Einion, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Aethelflaeda Ferch Eadwine of Mercia, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils avec Iwerydd Verch Cynfyn. Il est décédé en 1073, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edwin ap Gronwy of Tegeingl um 1020 in Flintshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gronwy ap Einion 22 und seine Mutter Aethelflaeda Ferch Eadwine of Mercia 22. Er hatte mit Iwerydd Verch Cynfyn mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb 1073 im Alter von 54 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edwin ap Gronwy of Tegeingl è nato il circa 1020 nel Flintshire, Galles, il suo padre, Gronwy ap Einion, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Aethelflaeda Ferch Eadwine of Mercia, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli con Iwerydd Verch Cynfyn. Morì nel 1073, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Flintshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Edwin ap Gronwy of Tegeinglが約1020年にウェールズフリントシュアイアで生まれた時，父Gronwy ap Einionは22歳，母Aethelflaeda Ferch Eadwine of Merciaは22歳であった。彼はIwerydd Verch Cynfynとの間に少なくとも5人の息子をもうけた。彼は1073年に故郷で54歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズフリントシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edwin ap Gronwy of Tegeingl(이)가 대략 1020년 웨일스 플린츠히르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gronwy ap Einion(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Aethelflaeda Ferch Eadwine of Mercia(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Iwerydd Verch Cynfyn(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1073년 그의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 플린츠히르에 묻혔다.

mg.Northrup, Coleshill, Flintshire, Wales: Flintshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom
mg.Dyfed, Wales: Dyfed, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edwin ap Gronwy of Tegeingl nasceu aproximadamente 1020, em Flintshire, Gales, seu pai, Gronwy ap Einion, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Aethelflaeda Ferch Eadwine of Mercia, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos com Iwerydd Verch Cynfyn. Ele faleceu em 1073, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Flintshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edwin ap Gronwy of Tegeingl родился около 1020 г. в местности флинцхир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Gronwy ap Einion было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Aethelflaeda Ferch Eadwine of Mercia, 22. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей от Iwerydd Verch Cynfyn. Он умер в 1073 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности флинцхир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edwin ap Gronwy of Tegeingl nació aproximadamente 1020, en Flintshire, Gales, su papá, Gronwy ap Einion, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Aethelflaeda Ferch Eadwine of Mercia, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos con Iwerydd Verch Cynfyn. Murió en 1073, en su pueblo, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Flintshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
